description_long: This stone is an irregular, roughly oval-shaped object with a coarse, granular surface composed of various mineral fragments. Its coloration is predominantly a mix of earthy browns, muted greens, and dark grays, with visible crystalline inclusions embedded throughout the matrix. The surface texture is uneven, featuring protruding grains and small pits, giving it a rugged, natural appearance. The stone appears dense and solid, with no visible cavities or artificial modifications. Its size and form suggest it could serve as a natural obstacle or decorative element in an urban landscape. The overall weathering and coloration indicate prolonged exposure to outdoor elements, likely contributing to its rough, matte finish.
description: A rugged, oval-shaped stone with a coarse, granular surface and a mix of earthy brown, green, and gray hues. Its uneven texture and visible mineral inclusions give it a natural, weathered appearance.
description_view_0: The stone is seen from a side angle, highlighting its elongated, oval profile and the pronounced roughness of its surface.
description_view_1: This view shows the broader face of the stone, revealing a dense concentration of greenish and dark mineral fragments.
description_view_2: The stone appears more tapered at the top, with a mix of granular textures and a slightly pointed end visible.
description_view_3: A rounded, wider face is visible, with a more uniform distribution of brown and green mineral grains across the surface.
attribute_placement: set as a standalone feature or obstacle on the ground
attribute_pattern: Mottled pattern with irregularly distributed mineral grains and crystalline inclusions, lacking any artificial carvings or regular veining.
attribute_weathering: Rough and weathered, with visible pitting and granular protrusions indicating prolonged exposure to outdoor elements.
attribute_integration_with_surroundings: Blends naturally with soil and other stones, providing a subtle contrast to paved surfaces and manicured landscaping.
